steps.title: Write the savings total
steps.content:
Hannah saves $\frac{h}{5}$, and Wyatt saves $\frac{2w}{7}$. Together, they save $3{,}270$.
$$
\frac{h}{5}+\frac{2w}{7}=3{,}270
$$

steps.title: Clear the denominators
steps.content: Multiply every term by $35$. $$ 7h+10w=35(3{,}270)=114{,}450 $$ The answer is D.
